tests.name: SubprocessRunner.start() returns AgentStartError{BinaryNotFound} when binary does not exist
SubprocessRunner.start() returns AgentStartError{WorkspacePathEscape} when workspace path escapes root
SubprocessRunner.start() returns AgentHandle with correct scenarioId and kind on success
SubprocessRunner.start() snapshots workspace files into initialFiles
SubprocessRunner.start() starts with turnsExecuted.count === 0
SubprocessRunner.turn() default args passes -p, --output-format, stream-json, --verbose, and prompt to binary
SubprocessRunner.turn() default args uses extraArgs instead of defaults when provided
SubprocessRunner.turn() Turn shape returns a Turn with index 0 on first call
SubprocessRunner.turn() Turn shape increments turnsExecuted.count after each turn
SubprocessRunner.turn() Turn shape second turn has index 1
SubprocessRunner.turn() timeout + error paths returns AgentRunTimeoutError when process exceeds timeoutMs
SubprocessRunner.turn() timeout + error paths returns AgentRunTimeoutError on spawn error (non-executable file)
SubprocessRunner.turn() timeout + error paths turnsExecuted.count is NOT incremented after a timeout
SubprocessRunner.turn() stream-json parsing extracts assistant content from 'assistant' event
SubprocessRunner.turn() stream-json parsing counts tool_use events as toolCallCount
SubprocessRunner.turn() stream-json parsing uses 'result' field as response when no assistant content precedes it
SubprocessRunner.turn() stream-json parsing assistant content takes priority over result when both present
SubprocessRunner.turn() stream-json parsing extracts token counts from usage object
SubprocessRunner.turn() stream-json parsing accumulates tokens across multiple usage events
SubprocessRunner.turn() stream-json parsing falls back to raw stdout when no JSON lines present
SubprocessRunner.turn() stream-json parsing ignores non-JSON lines mixed with JSON lines
SubprocessRunner.turn() stream-json parsing uses stderr as fallback response when stdout is empty
SubprocessRunner.diff() returns empty diff when no files changed
SubprocessRunner.diff() detects a new file added to workspace
SubprocessRunner.diff() detects a modified file in workspace
SubprocessRunner.diff() detects a deleted file in workspace
SubprocessRunner.diff() reports no change for an unchanged file alongside a changed one
SubprocessRunner.stop() removes the workspace directory
SubprocessRunner.stop() is idempotent — second stop() does not fail
SubprocessRunner.start() property: never throws for any scenario, start() resolves to a tagged result — never an unhandled exception
DockerRunner.start() returns AgentStartError{ImageMissing} when docker image inspect fails
DockerRunner.start() returns AgentStartError{ContainerStartFailed} when docker create fails
DockerRunner.start() returns AgentHandle on happy path with correct kind and containerId
DockerRunner.start() passes network: bridge option in docker create command
DockerRunner.start() passes memoryMb: 512 option in docker create command
DockerRunner.start() passes cpus: 2 option in docker create command
DockerRunner.stop() removes workspace directory
DockerRunner.stop() calls docker kill and docker rm when containerId is present
DockerRunner.stop() skips docker calls when containerId is undefined
DockerRunner.stop() is idempotent — second stop() does not fail even when workspace is gone
DockerRunner.stop() succeeds even when docker kill throws (container already dead)
property: schema invariants Property 1: ScenarioYamlSchema accepts arbitrary valid-shaped objects
property: schema invariants Property 2: ScenarioYamlSchema YAML round-trip preserves required fields
property: schema invariants Property 3: RunRecord schema encodes non-negative numeric constraints (latencyMs, runNumber, tokens)
property: schema invariants Property 4: RunRecord schema rejects negative latencyMs (timestamp ordering invariant)
property: schema invariants Property 5: WORKSPACE_PATH_PATTERN — matching paths have no absolute prefix, no traversal, no backslash
scenarioLoader properties Prop1 roundtrip: YAML.stringify → loadFromYaml preserves the generated scenario
scenarioLoader properties Prop2 WORKSPACE_PATH_PATTERN invariant: any decoded workspace path is scenario-relative
scenarioLoader properties Prop3 collision detection: two files with the same id yield a tagged DuplicateId error
scenarioLoader properties Prop4 malformed input: arbitrary garbage resolves to a tagged LoadError, never an uncaught throw
runScenarios produces a Report with pass counts for a happy-path runner+judge
runScenarios reports failure when judge fails
scoreTraces builds records from traces without invoking a runner
scenarioLoader.loadFromYaml decodes a valid YAML scenario
scenarioLoader.loadFromYaml rejects YAML missing required fields
scenarioLoader.loadFromPath loads a directory of YAML scenarios and enforces unique ids
scenarioLoader.loadFromPath rejects duplicate scenario ids across files
scenarioLoader.loadFromPath rejects workspace paths that are absolute or contain .. segments
scenarioLoader.loadFromPath fails with GlobNoMatches on an empty pattern
canonicalTraceAdapter decodes a valid canonical JSON trace
canonicalTraceAdapter rejects invalid canonical payload
otelTraceAdapter extracts turns from gen_ai.* attributes
otelTraceAdapter rejects otel envelope with no LLM spans
getTraceAdapter dispatches by format
ReportEmitter writes results.jsonl + summary.md + details/*.yaml
ReportEmitter readRunsJsonl round-trips
DockerRunner integration (real Docker) start() yields a running container; stop() tears it down
runCommand runner-resolution failure exits 2 when runtime=docker but --image is missing
runCommand runner-resolution failure exits 2 when runtime=subprocess but --bin is missing
